issue_title: In the deals and scenarios screen, place the analyze deal button in line with the adress input box.
issue_body: The idea is that the blue button for the analyze deal should be in line witht he adress input box making it look symmetrical and intentional

Opening content: - Protect product quality, code quality, and system integrity. - The Quality Control Analyst ensures that all delivered work is clear, testable, maintainable, consistent with architectural standards, and safe to merge.

bootstrap_notes.md is a general project file file. Main sections: Bootstrap Notes, First implementation steps, Recommended next docs. Opening content: 1. Put this repo in GitHub as your AI Company OS repo. 2. Add your preferred coding agent instructions to each agent file.
